case_title: AFLAKI-BENI, ALIREZA et al VS PAKISTAN INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,488.00 FILED BY AFLAKI-BENI, ALIREZA AFLAKI-BENI, PARVIN AS TO DEFENDANT PAKISTAN INTERNATIONAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MUAZAN SHAIKH RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-15-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AFLAKI-BENI, PARVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAKISTAN INTERNATIONAL $450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00, COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION AND AFTER REVIEWING THE EVIDENCE HAS ADDED PARVIN AFLAKI-BENI AS A PROPER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PAKISTAN INTERNATIONAL
